# Amazon Bedrock - What is Amazon Bedrock?

## Core Definition
Fully managed service providing secure, enterprise-grade access to high-performing foundation models from leading AI companies.

## Supported APIs
1. Responses API (OpenAI Compatible)
2. Chat Completions API (OpenAI Compatible)
3. Invoke API (Boto3)
4. Converse API (Boto3)

## Featured Models (100+ foundation models)
- Nova 2 (Amazon)
- Claude Opus 4.6 (Anthropic)
- Deepseek 3.2 (DeepSeek)
- Kimi K2.5 (Moonshot AI)
- MiniMax M2.1 (MiniMax)
- GPT-OSS-20B (OpenAI)

## Model Providers
Amazon, Anthropic, DeepSeek, Moonshot AI, MiniMax, OpenAI

## What's New
- OpenAI-Compatible Projects API (Mantle inference engine)
- Anthropic Claude 4.6 Models (Sonnet 4.6, Opus 4.6) - February 2026
- Six New Open Weight Models (February 2026): DeepSeek V3.2, MiniMax M2.1, GLM 4.7, GLM 4.7 Flash, Kimi K2.5, Qwen3 Coder Next
- Server-Side Tools Support (January 2026): Responses API with AgentCore Gateway tools

## Build Resources
- APIs, Endpoints, Model Inference, Custom Models
